description: Authority revocation policy for refusing continuation after an authority basis has been revoked.

AUTHORITY_VALID.condition: Authority remains valid or continuation has been validly revalidated.

REVOCATION_WARNING.condition: Authority revocation is pending but not yet active.

REVALIDATION_REQUIRED.condition: Authority has been revoked, but no protected consequence is attempted yet.

REVOKED_AUTHORITY_REFUSED.condition: Authority has been revoked and protected consequence binding is attempted without revalidation.

OPERATIONAL_DIVERGENCE.condition: Operational trace changed, so authority-revocation continuity cannot be isolated.

ARW_NONE.condition: No authority revocation issue is present.

ARW_P2.condition: Authority revoked but no protected consequence is attempted.

ARW_P3.condition: Revoked authority with protected consequence attempted.

ARW_P4.condition: Revoked authority, protected consequence attempted, and custody or standing basis is no longer valid.

NOT_APPLICABLE.condition: Operational continuity failed, so authority revocation cannot be isolated.
